qa_pairs.task_instruction: I need to transport a heavy pallet of boxes across the workshop. Which vehicle near the shelves is designed for this task?
I need to pour oil into the engine without spilling. What red conical object is sitting on the black cabinet?
I need to tighten a screw on the lift mechanism. Which tool with an orange and black handle is lying on the notched metal bar?
I need to secure a clevis pin to prevent it from sliding out. What small, bent metal wire is lying on the red beam near the hand?
The mower deck is covered in grass clippings. Which yellow machine with a hose in the background is used for cleaning?
I need to grip a stubborn nut. What tool with red handles is resting on the black footrest of the lawnmower?
I need to check the time or read a message. What device with a green case is being held up in front of the camera?
